description: Seven-day time grid view with configurable first day of week, slot duration, resource grouping, and drag-and-drop. Delegates rendering to TmSchedulerTimeGrid.

examples.title: Week view with 15-minute slots
examples.code: <TmSchedulerWeekView CurrentDate="DateTime.Today" Events="@_events" FirstDayOfWeek="1" SlotDuration="15" OnSlotClick="@HandleSlotClick" OnEventClick="@HandleEventClick" />
